name: §dEndermite
description:
§8Mining Pet

§7Intelligence: §b150
§7Pet Luck: §d[Pet Luck]

§6More Stonks
§7Gain more exp orbs for breaking end
§7stone and gain a +§a100% §7chance to get
§7an extra block dropped

§6Daily Commuter
§9Transmission Abilities §7cost §a40% §7less
§7mana

§6Mite Bait
§7Gain a §a3% §7chance to dig up a bonus
§cNest Endermite §7per §d+1♣ Pet Luck
§8(Stacks above 100%)

§6Sacrificer
§7Increases the odds of rolling for
§7bonus items in the §cDraconic Altar §7by
§a?%§7.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

variants.name: Dynamite Endermite Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aEndermite§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
